summary: Testing Report Value Columns (MRP/Cost Split) for Audix Counter. All 10 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend verification complete - all tables display correct value columns (Stock Val MRP/Cost, Phys Val MRP/Cost, Diff Val MRP/Cost). CSV export includes value columns.
critical_code_review_comments: All consolidated report endpoints return MRP/Cost value columns: detailed, barcode-wise, article-wise, category-summary
All session report endpoints return MRP/Cost value columns: detailed, barcode-wise, article-wise, category-summary
Consolidated bin-wise report shows pending locations with status field and summary.pending count
Frontend DetailedTable shows Stock Val(MRP), Stock Val(Cost), Phys Val(MRP), Phys Val(Cost), Diff Val(MRP), Diff Val(Cost)
Frontend BarcodeWiseTable shows all MRP/Cost value columns
Frontend ArticleWiseTable shows all MRP/Cost value columns
Frontend CategorySummaryTable shows all MRP/Cost value columns
CSV export includes all value columns for all report types
calc_values helper function correctly computes MRP and Cost values
All totals in API responses include value columns with proper aggregation

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All tables verified with MRP/Cost columns

seed_data_creation: Used existing client 'Nimans' with session 'Day 1' containing physical_qty data (125 qty in 5 locations synced by Rohit, Yogesh)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Report value columns (MRP/Cost split) testing complete. All backend endpoints verified: consolidated (detailed, barcode-wise, article-wise, category-summary, bin-wise) and session (detailed, barcode-wise, article-wise, category-summary). Frontend tables display columns correctly. CSV export includes value columns.
